name: Heavy Engineer
description: Bomb disposal armor, gauntlets crackling with elemental energy, and a bandolier of grenades. When in doubt, blow it up. The Heavy Engineer solves problems through application of overwhelming explosive force.

abilities.name: Power Punch
abilities.description: A full-force gauntlet strike, elemental energy discharging on impact.

abilities.name: Frag Grenade
abilities.description: A fragmentation grenade — three bursts of shrapnel tearing through the target.

abilities.name: Incendiary Round
abilities.description: A thermite-tipped round that ignites on impact. Deals initial damage and leaves the target burning.

abilities.name: Cluster Bomb
abilities.description: A cluster munition that releases multiple explosive submunitions. Three separate detonations, each full-force.
